memoryArtifacts.headline: Crusader in the 3rd Crusade. Nigel was killed at Arsuf and died at Acre, Hatzafon, Israel. He was the buried at sea. 1191
Nigel & Mabel de Mowbray
memoryArtifacts.description:
NIGEL de MOWBRAY (GUILLAUME 1, ROGER 2, NIGEL 3, ROGER 4)

m. MABEL de CLARE
d. 1191 Acre

The Red Book of the Exchequer listed the scutage payments for 1190-1 for "Nigellus de Munbray xliv / ii s vi …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nigel de Mowbray於1146年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray27歲，母親Alice De Gant26歲。他於大約1170年與Mabel de Clare結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1189年登記服兵役。他去世於1191年在巴勒斯坦享年45歲，埋葬在亞特 澤亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nigel de Mowbray于1146年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray27岁，母亲Alice De Gant26岁。他于大约1170年与Mabel de Clare结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1189年登记服兵役。他去世于1191年在巴勒斯坦享年45岁，埋葬在亞特 澤亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Nigel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval name Nigellus, a Latinized version (ostensibly representing a diminutive of Latin niger ‘black’) of the vernacular Ni(h)el, i.e. Neil . Although it is frequently found in medieval records, this form was probably not used in everyday life before its revival by antiquarians such as Sir Walter Scott in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Nigel de Mowbray was born in 1146, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray, was 27 and his mother, Alice De Gant, was 26. He married Mabel de Clare about 1170. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1189. He died in 1191, in Palestine, at the age of 45, and was buried in At Sea.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nigel de Mowbray est né en 1146, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice De Gant, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mabel de Clare environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1189. Il est décédé en 1191, à Palestine, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à En mer.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nigel de Mowbray 1146 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray 27 und seine Mutter Alice De Gant 26. Er hat um 1170 Mabel de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1189 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1191 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in Auf dem Meer begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nigel de Mowbray è nato il nel 1146 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice De Gant, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mabel de Clare circa 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1189. Morì nel 1191, nel Palestina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a At Sea.

ja.lifeSummary: Nigel de Mowbrayが1146年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbrayは27歳，母Alice De Gantは26歳であった。約1170年にMabel de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1189年に兵役登録をした。彼は1191年にパレスチナで45歳で死去し，アト セアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nigel de Mowbray(이)가 1146년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Gant(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1170년 Mabel de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1191년 팔레스타인에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 앳 시에 묻혔다.

mn.Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino: Epworth, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nigel de Mowbray nasceu em 1146, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Gant, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel de Clare aproximadamente 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1189. Ele faleceu em 1191, em Palestina, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Em alto mar.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nigel de Mowbray родился в 1146 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Gant, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel de Clare около 1170 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1189 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1191 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности ат сеа.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nigel de Mowbray nació en 1146, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alice De Gant, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Mabel de Clare aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1189. Murió en 1191, en Palestina, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en En el mar.
